title: abussos #0012
definition:
1) bottomless
 2) unbounded
 3) the abyss
    3a) the pit
    3b) the immeasurable depth
    3c) of Orcus, a very deep gulf or chasm in the lowest parts
        of the earth used as the common receptacle of the dead and
        especially as the abode of demons
